paradigm: natural 5-gen crystallize — uniform iteration rule, no synthetic gen-5 assertion

evidence: Under the uniform 1/r^2 lattice + TL=800 crystallize rule, gen 5 naturally reproduces gen 4 fixpoint (sealed=9, score=1000) for all tested seeds. No special gen-5 assertion.
notes: Each seed runs gens 1..5 under the SAME uniform rule (no gen-5 special case). W_5 emerges from the 1/r^2 lattice dynamics. For seed 20260423 gen 5 was computed via natural_gen5_resume.hexa due to stage0 RSS cap at 4GB; rule is identical (seed derivation (sig*13+86)%P, size=3, tl=800).
